metadata.title: EG-PCS: Eye-Tracking-Guided Perceived Cycling Safety Dataset
metadata.description: The EG-PCS dataset accompanies research on perceived cycling safety from street-level imagery. It contains pairwise perceived cycling safety comparisons, released street-view image files, fixation-derived gaze maps, and sanitized eye-tracking source sessions used to document and regenerate the gaze-map layer. Version 1.1.0 adds curated eye-tracking source sessions, source-session manifest files, bridge columns from comparison rows to source sessions and trial screenshots, and a public script for building gaze maps from fixation tables using a 32-pixel Gaussian smoothing scale.
